Title: Successful Google Sign-In and Family Activity Transition
Preconditions:
- User has Google account linked to the app.
- Internet connection is available.
Test Steps:
1. User taps "Sign In with Google" in the app.
2. User enters valid email (`sebastianocavalet@gmail.com`) and grants permissions.
3. System calls `handleSignInTask(Task<GoogleSignInAccount> task)` in `LoginActivity`.
4. User is redirected to `FamilyActivity`.
Expected Result:
- User is successfully authenticated.
- `FamilyActivity` loads without errors.
- No error messages or crashes occur.

Title: Failed Google Sign-In (Invalid Credentials)
Preconditions: - User attempts to sign in with invalid credentials.
Test Data: - Invalid email (e.g., `invalidemail@example.com`) or no internet connection.
Test Steps:
1. User taps "Sign In with Google" and enters invalid credentials.
2. System attempts to call `handleSignInTask(Task<GoogleSignInAccount> task)`.
3. Error occurs (e.g., "Sign-in failed").
Expected Result:
- User sees an error message (e.g., "Invalid email or network error").
- User remains on `LoginActivity` or is prompted to retry.
- No crash or data leakage occurs.

Title: Create New Family with Valid Inputs
Test Data:
- Family name: "Cavalet"
- Surname: "Family"
- Gender: "Male"
- Date of birth: "15/01/2023"
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to `CreaFamilyActivity`.
2. User fills in the form with valid data and taps "Create".
3. System calls `createFamily("Cavalet", "Family", "Male", "15/01/2023")`.
4. System generates a family code via `randomGenerator(6)` and stores it.
Expected Result:
- Family is created successfully.
- Family code (e.g., "5Rqbuh0N9S") is displayed or sent to the user.
- User is redirected to `HomeActivity`.
- No validation errors appear.

Title: Join Existing Family with Valid Code
Preconditions:
- A family exists with code "5Rqbuh0N9S".
- User is in `JoinFamilyActivity`.
Test Steps:
1. User enters the family code "5Rqbuh0N9S" in the input field.
2. System calls `checkCode("5Rqbuh0N9S")`.
3. User is added to the family.
Expected Result:
- User is successfully joined to the family.
- User is redirected to `HomeActivity`.
- No error messages appear.

Title: Join Family with Invalid Code
Test Steps:
1. User enters "123456" and taps "Join".
2. System calls `checkCode("123456")`.
3. System detects invalid code.
Expected Result:
- User sees an error message: "Invalid family code. Please try again."
- User remains on `JoinFamilyActivity`.
- No crash or data corruption occurs.

Title: Access Monitoring Section from Bottom Menu
Test Steps:
1. User taps the bottom menu icon (e.g., "Monitoring" option).
2. System evaluates `Accesso al menu a fondo` decision as "SI".
3. User is redirected to `Sezione di monitoraggio` (`MonitorFragment`).
Expected Result:
- `MonitorFragment` loads successfully.
- No delays or crashes occur.
- UI reflects the monitoring section (e.g., graphs, timers).

Title: Access Notes Section from Bottom Menu
Test Steps:
1. User taps the bottom menu icon (e.g., "Notes" option).
2. System evaluates `Accesso al menu a fondo` decision as "NO".
3. User is redirected to `Note` section (`NoteFragment`).
4. User taps "Return to Home".
5. System returns to `HOME` (`HomeActivity`).
Expected Result:
- `NoteFragment` loads without errors.
- "Return to Home" button works and redirects to `HomeActivity`.
- No data loss or UI glitches occur.

Title: Start and Stop Left Breastfeeding Timer
Preconditions:
- User is in `AllattamentoFragment` (child: "Allattamento").
- Left breast timer is initialized (e.g., `Left: "0"`).
Test Steps:
1. User taps "Start Left" button.
2. System calls `startTimerLeft()` and `startStopLeft(View view)`.
3. Timer starts counting (e.g., displays "00:05:00").
4. User taps "Stop Left" after 5 minutes.
5. System calls `startStopLeft(View view)` again and stops timer.
6. System updates `Left: "5"` in `Allattamento` entity.
Expected Result:
- Timer starts and stops accurately.
- UI updates to show "5" minutes for the left breast.
- No crashes or incorrect time display.

Title: Reset Breastfeeding Timer
Test Steps:
1. User taps "Reset Left" button.
2. System calls `resetLeft(View view)` and `setButtonUILeft(int color)`.
3. Timer resets to "0".
4. System updates `Left: "0"` in `Allattamento` entity.
Expected Result:
- Left timer resets to "0".
- UI reflects the reset (e.g., button color changes to indicate reset).
- No data corruption in `Allattamento` entity.

Title: View Sleep Graph in Profile
Preconditions:
- User has sleep data recorded for the child.
- User is in `ProfileActivity`.
Test Steps:
1. User taps "Sleep Graph" option.
2. System loads `GraphSonnoFragment`.
3. System calls `graphSonno(View view)`.
Expected Result:
- Sleep graph renders correctly with historical data.
- No loading errors or empty graph.
- UI is responsive to user interactions (e.g., zooming).

Title: View Growth Graph in Profile
Preconditions:
- User has growth data recorded for the child.
- User is in `ProfileActivity`.
Test Steps:
1. User taps "Growth Graph" option.
2. System loads `GraphCrescitaFragment`.
3. System calls `graphCrescita(View view)`.
Expected Result:
- Growth graph displays data points (e.g., weight/height over time).
- Graph is interactive (e.g., tooltips on data points).
- No errors or missing data.

Title: Create and Edit a Note
Preconditions: - User is in `HomeActivity` and taps "Notes" from the bottom menu.
Test Steps:
1. User taps "+ Add Note" in `NoteFragment`.
2. System loads `EditNoteFragment`.
3. User types: "Child had 6 feedings today" and taps "Save".
4. System returns to `NoteFragment` and displays the new note.
5. User taps the note to edit it.
6. User changes text to "Child had 6 feedings today, slept 14 hours" and taps "Save".
Expected Result:
- Note is created and displayed in `NoteFragment`.
- Edited note updates correctly.
- No data loss or UI lag.

Title: Delete a Note
Preconditions: - User has at least one note in `NoteFragment`.
Test Steps:
1. User long-presses a note.
2. System shows "Delete" option.
3. User confirms deletion.
Expected Result:
- Note is removed from `NoteFragment`.
- No errors or crashes occur.
- Remaining notes are unaffected.

Title: Log Out of Application
Test Steps:
1. User taps "Log Out" button.
2. System calls `abbandona(String userId, GoogleSignInClient googleSignInClient)`.
3. User is redirected to `LoginActivity`.
Expected Result:
- User is successfully logged out.
- All session data is cleared.
- `LoginActivity` loads without errors.

Title: Handle Empty Family Name During Creation
Test Steps:
1. User leaves "Family Name" field empty and taps "Create".
2. System validates input and rejects empty name.
Expected Result:
- Error message: "Family name cannot be empty."
- User remains on `CreaFamilyActivity`.
- No family is created.

Title: Handle Invalid Date Format in Family Creation
Test Steps:
1. User enters "2023/15/01" and taps "Create".
2. System calls `getDate()` and detects invalid format.
Expected Result:
- Error message: "Please enter a valid date (DD/MM/YYYY)."
- User remains on `CreaFamilyActivity`.
- No crash or data corruption.

Title: Timer Overflow (Exceeds 24 Hours)
Preconditions: - User starts a timer and simulates 25 hours of feeding.
Test Steps:
1. User starts `startTimerLeft()` and manually sets time to 25 hours.
2. System attempts to display time via `formatTime(int seconds, int minutes, int hours)`.
Expected Result:
- Timer resets to "00:00:00" or shows an overflow error.
- No crash or incorrect time display.
- User is prompted to reset manually.

Title: End-to-End Flow: Sign In → Create Family → Start Feeding Timer → View Graphs
Preconditions: - User has Google account and no existing family.
